---
title: "Parent's Choice or School's Choice? Discrimination Against Students in Admission to Private, Charter, and Traditional Public Schools"
date: 2025-08-01
author:
  - name: Hussain Hadah
    url: https://www.hussainhadah.com/
    affiliation: Northwestern University
  - name: Patrick Button
    affiliation: Tulane University
  - name: Douglas Harris
    affiliation: Tulane University
  - name: Barbara Lundebjerg*
    affiliation: ""
categories:
  - Discrimination
  - Audit
  - Education
  - School Choice
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Hussain Hadah</strong>, Patrick Button, Douglas Harris, &amp; Barbara Lundebjerg*. "Parent's Choice or School's Choice? Discrimination Against Students in Admission to Private, Charter, and Traditional Public Schools." Funded by a $140,747 grant from J-PAL.
  links:
    - name: Russell Sage LOI
      url: https://hhadah.github.io/statements/EducationAudit-LOI-RST-Final.pdf
      icon: fa-solid fa-file-pdf
      local: false
    - name: J-PAL Slides
      url: https://hhadah.github.io/jpal-presentation/hadah-jpal-presentation.html
      icon: fa-solid fa-presentation-screen
      local: false
  extra: >-
    Estimating discrimination based on race and ethnicity (White, Black, Hispanic), sexual orientation, gender identity, disability (IEP), and religion. Pilot study in Fall 2025.
pub-status:
  status: In Design
  class: warning
  icon: fa-solid fa-pencil
---
